code: import React,{useState,useContext}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{AuthContext}from'../App';import{API_URL}from'../config';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Login=()=>{const[username,setUsername]=useState('');const[password,setPassword]=useState('');const[errorMsg,setErrorMsg]=useState('');const{login}=useContext(AuthContext);const navigate=useNavigate();const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();setErrorMsg('');try{const res=await fetch(`${API_URL}/api/auth/login`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({username,password})});const data=await res.json();if(res.ok){login(data.token);navigate('/');}else{setErrorMsg(data.msg==='Invalid credentials'?'登录失败，请检查用户名或密码。':data.msg);}}catch(err){console.error(err);setErrorMsg('服务器错误，请稍后再试。');}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"form-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"\u767B\u5F55"}),errorMsg&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{color:'#e30000',marginBottom:'15px',fontSize:'14px',fontWeight:500},children:errorMsg}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"Apple ID (\u7528\u6237\u540D)",value:username,onChange:e=>setUsername(e.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",placeholder:"\u5BC6\u7801",value:password,onChange:e=>setPassword(e.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"\u7EE7\u7EED"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["\u8FD8\u6CA1\u6709\u8D26\u53F7\uFF1F ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:"/register",children:"\u7ACB\u5373\u521B\u5EFA\u3002"})]})]});};export default Login;
